description_long: This object is a classic cartoon-style bomb with a spherical black body and a short, brown fuse protruding from the top. The surface is matte black and features bold, red graffiti-style writing that reads 'BOOM!' with stylized X's for eyes, suggesting danger or detonation. The fuse is slightly curved and appears to be made of a different material, likely a coated cord or rope. The bomb's body is smooth and seamless, with no visible seams or mechanical parts, giving it a simple yet menacing appearance. The red markings are hand-drawn and irregular, adding to the urban, graffiti-inspired aesthetic. This bomb would be visually striking and easily recognizable in any urban environment, such as an alleyway or abandoned lot.
description: A matte black, spherical bomb with a brown fuse and bold red graffiti-style 'BOOM!' text on its surface. The design is simple, smooth, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The bomb is seen from the back, showing a smooth black surface with the brown fuse on top and no visible markings.
description_view_1: The front view displays the red graffiti 'BOOM!' text and X's for eyes, with the fuse clearly visible at the top.
description_view_2: This side view shows the continuation of the red graffiti, including the exclamation mark and part of the 'BOOM!' text, with the fuse angled forward.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bomb is visible, showing a mostly plain black surface with the fuse on top and only a hint of red graffiti at the edge.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The bomb features a visible fuse at the top, suggesting detonation is initiated by lighting the fuse, which would burn down to the main body.
